697ffd37ebd2434728547a8a.question: Do not read to Brown A. One class of these compounds is hypothesized to shift lateral pressure profiles away from the hydrophobic core of lipid bilayers. EMLA (“E-M-L-A”) is a 5-percent eutectic mixture of two of these compounds that forms an emulsified cream. The potency of these compounds can be estimated using MACs (“M-A-C’s”), which vary inversely to lipid solubility according to the Meyer–Overton hypothesis. They’re not vaccines but, adjuvants for these compounds include sodium bicarbonate to minimize ionization and epinephrine to prolong clearance time. Volatile examples of these compounds like sevoflurane are often administered using a mixture of oxygen and nitrous oxide carrier gases. For 10 points, name these drugs administered in “local” or “general” procedures to cause temporary loss of sensation.
